svg.text: 39-Entity Deployment Group
I. Functions of Entity Deployment Groups
Entity Deployment Groups are used to quickly manage multiple entities, and can batch create and batch destroy entities through related nodes.
All unit types with physical entities can be assigned: Creations, Characters, Objects, and Terrains. The same entity can belong to multiple groups.
II. Global Definition of Entity Deployment Groups
Before using Entity Deployment Groups, define them globally in the Entity Deployment Groups Management Tool.
In the system menu, click Manage Entity Deployment Groups to open the tool.
The left panel shows the management bar for browsing existing groups. Click Add Entity Deployment Groups to create new ones.
After selecting a group, configure its settings and view the content list in the details panel on the right. Tabs can be created to categorize groups.
III. Managing Entity Deployment Groups
Adding Entities
In the Terrain Editing tab, right-click terrain and choose Add to Entity Deployment Group.
In the Entity Placement tab, right-click an entity (Shift+click for multiple) and choose Add to Entity Deployment Group.
In the Details interface, click Select in Scene to enter selection mode and add entities by box-selecting or clicking.
Details Interface Settings
Entity Deployment Group Name: customizable name for identification.
Index: unique identifier used for Node Graph operations on this group.
Initial Create: determines whether the group's terrain and static objects are created when the stage starts.
If either the group or an individual entity has Initial Create enabled, that entity is created at stage start.
Content List: lists all units in the group. Right-click a unit to remove it or swap it to another group.
IV. Node Graph Control
Get Currently Active Entity Deployment Group List
Retrieves all active Entity Deployment Groups for use in node logic.
Activate/Disable Entity Deployment Group
Enables or disables a specific Entity Deployment Group at runtime via Node Graph.
AI Generated, based on Craftspeople Academy. Version: Luna 7
